Quarters.title: Crew Quarters
Quarters.description:
A private living space for assigned crew members.

Capacity is dictated by the amount of sleeping spots.

GrowRoom.title: Grow Room
GrowRoom.description: A designated space to grow plants, fruit, and vegetables.

Brig.title: Brig
Brig.description: A designated space to hold prisoners.

MessHall.title: Mess Hall
MessHall.description: A designated space for dining and cooking.

Bridge.title: Bridge
Bridge.description: The room containing the ship's navigation and command centres.

SickBay.title: Sick Bay
SickBay.description: A designated space to keep sick or injured crew members.

CargoBay.title: Cargo Bay
CargoBay.description: A designated space to store cargo and supplies.

EngineRoom.title: Engine Room
EngineRoom.description: The room containing the ship's engines and related machinery.

LifeSupport.title: Life Support
LifeSupport.description: The room containing the ship's atmospheric and environmental systems.
